# Solution

> AI solution built by users (agent, workflow, pipeline, or chatbot)

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| organizationId | string | yes | - | Organization that owns this solution |
| name | string | yes | - | Solution name |
| description | string | yes | - | Solution description |
| type | agent \| workflow \| pipeline \| chatbot | yes | - | Solution type |
| status | draft \| active \| paused \| archived | yes | draft | Current status |
| config | json | yes | - | Solution configuration (model, system prompt, tools, etc.) |
| version | string | yes | 0.1.0 | Current version (semver) |
| publishedAt | date | yes | - | When the solution was last published |
| metrics | json | yes | - | Aggregated metrics (runs, cost, avg_latency) |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Relations

- belongsTo **Organization** (via `organizationId`)

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/solution` — List all
- `POST /api/solution` — Create
- `GET /api/solution/:id` — Get by ID

- `DELETE /api/solution/:id` — Delete
